decision: Featured STAMPED Amapiano (Jun 14) as #1 pick over Young the Giant (Jun 6) and Spyro Gyra (Jun 17)
alternatives_considered: Young the Giant (Jun 6) — indie rock, outdoor amphitheater, older demo
Spyro Gyra (Jun 17) — jazz fusion, winery setting, upscale couples
Reggae on Rooftop (Jun 20) — Juneteenth weekend, larger festival
why_rejected: Young the Giant is solo-artist focused; STAMPED is pure dance energy and explicitly a couples/AYA crowd
predicted_outcome: STAMPED drives higher saves + shares due to dancefloor energy and Amapiano trend
dissent_text: Spyro Gyra has higher per-ticket spend ($$$) and wine+dinner combo = longer dwell time. But niche jazz demo vs mass-appeal Amapiano
